hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && pixi run ruff check --fix "$f" && pixi run ruff format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && pixi run pyright "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt: Before compacting, summarise: (1) the current task and its status, (2) any design decisions made, (3) files modified and why, (4) any open questions or blockers. Include this in the compaction summary.
